single.reason: Single-event page renders in the same responsive grid as the populated state; the load-bearing boundary here is empty vs populated, both covered.

many.reason: Events grid wraps responsively with no truncation or pagination; more events only add rows, not a distinct visual state.

loading.reason: Fully static (statically-exported) page with content collections resolved at build; no async/loading state.

edge.reason: Optional-field branches (an event with no link) are exercised within the typical scenario; no distinct edge layout.

error.reason: Static content page with no data fetching; no failure/error state can occur.

key-interaction.reason: Primary actions are outbound links (Subscribe, Volunteer, View Events, mailto); no in-page interactive state to capture.

empty.reason: Each route renders one existing chapter; there is no empty state for a single-chapter page

single.reason: Each chapter route renders exactly one chapter by design; the typical scenario is that single-chapter view

many.reason: A chapter route renders one chapter; the set of chapters lives in the nav dropdown, not this view

loading.reason: Static SSG route rendered at build time; no async loading state

edge.reason: Sparse chapter with no leads/links is demonstrated by the ChapterPage component scenario chapterpage-sparse-no-leads

error.reason: Static SSG route; content collection validated at build, no runtime error state

key-interaction.reason: Presentational page; the only actions are external chapter links (WhatsApp, Eventbrite)

empty.reason: Empty events list is demonstrated by the EventsPage component scenario eventspage-no-events; not duplicated as a route scenario

single.reason: Single event is a data count, not a distinct layout; the auto-fit card grid is exercised by the typical scenario

many.reason: Auto-fit card grid; the typical four-event scenario already exercises multi-card wrap across upcoming and past

loading.reason: Static SSG route rendered at build time; no async loading state

error.reason: Static SSG route; content collection is validated at build, no runtime error state

key-interaction.reason: Presentational page; the only actions are external links to event registration
